input.topic: LockBit Black variant consolidation and legacy redirect cleanup
input.notes: Corpus review confirmed that `lockbit-black.md` was modeling LockBit 3.0 / LockBit Black as a separate threat actor when it is better treated as a ransomware variant within the canonical LockBit profile. The legacy slug now redirects to `/threat-actors/lockbit/`. Follow up by reviewing downstream references, search labels, and any future variant-specific content to ensure LockBit 3.0 remains represented as part of the canonical LockBit actor rather than as a duplicate actor page.

history.note: Queued follow-on cleanup after consolidating LockBit Black into the canonical LockBit actor profile.

downstream audit — canonical threat-actors/lockbit.md already carries "LockBit 3.0 (LockBit Black)" as an alias (line 27) and a dedicated evolution paragraph covering LockBit 2.0/3.0/Green (line 101); DragonForce body reference to LockBit 3.0 code is descriptive prose not a slug ref; redirect to /threat-actors/lockbit/ in place
